nasb.text: But before very long there rushed down from the land a violent wind, called Euraquilo;

esv.text: But soon a tempestuous wind, called the northeaster, struck down from the land.

cnv.text: 可是過了不久，有一股名叫“友拉革羅”的颶風，向島上吹襲。

ccb.text: 可是出发不久，便遇到从岛上刮来的猛烈的东北风，

csbs.text: 但是过了不久，一股叫做“东北风”的飓风，从岛上袭来。
